name: Snowplow Analytics
description: Snowplow Analytics — Open-source behavioral data platform for collecting granular event data into your own warehouse.

seo.title: Snowplow Analytics — Product Analytics
seo.meta_description: Snowplow Analytics: Snowplow Analytics — Open-source behavioral data platform for collecting granular event data into your own warehouse.

when_to_use: Collect granular behavioral events into owned warehouse
Open-source alternative to Segment for data collection
Server-side event tracking for privacy-first analytics
Custom event schema for product analytics in Snowflake
First-party behavioral data pipeline without SaaS lock-in

pros: Granular, raw event data in your own warehouse
Open-source core gives full schema control
No vendor lock-in on your behavioral data
cons: Requires significant engineering to run well
Steep learning curve versus packaged analytics
Need to bring your own BI and modeling tools
review.verdict: Gold standard for owning your event data; real cost is engineering time, not software license.
review.best_for: Data-mature teams wanting warehouse-native, schema-controlled behavioral data they fully own.
review.not_for: Small teams without data engineers or anyone wanting turnkey packaged analytics.
